title: Proclamation No. 98, s. 1963
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 98

RESERVING FOR PARKS AND PLAYGROUND PURPOSES CERTAIN PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE CITY OF DAGUPAN, ISLAND OF LUZON

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of section 83, Chapter ill, of Commonwealth Act No. 141, as amended, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philipines, do hereby withdraw from the sale or settlement and reserve for parks and playground purposes under the administration of the City of Dagupan, subject to private rights, if any there be, certain parcels of the public domain situated in the City of Dagupan, Island of Luzon, and more particularly described as follows:

Lot No. 9095-A, Bsd-4017

A parcel of land Lot No. 9095-A, situated in the district of Bonuan Gueset, Dagupan City. Bounded on the NW. along lines 9-10; 10-11; 11-12; 12-13 by Lingayen -Gulf; on the NE along line 13-1; and 1-2 by Lot No. 8901-C, Bsd-3985 or Lot No. 9094; on the SE. along line 2-3 by Lot No. 8262, Dagupan Cad. on the SW. along line 3-6; 6-7; 7-8 by Lot Nos. 9095-F of the same subdivision; and on the SW. along line 8-9 by a barrio road which is Lot No. 9095-C. Beginning at a point marked one 1 on plan being N. 37° 56′ W. 68.50 meters more or less from BBM-No. 12, Dagupan Cadastre.

Thence: S. 50° 09′ W., 230.00 meters to point 2; N. 23° 50′ W., 43.79 meters to point 3; N. 23° 50′ W., 6.79 meters to point 4; N. 58° 06′ E., 16.50 meters to point 5; N. 46° 49″ E., 28.79 meters to point 6; N. 65° 36′ E., 57.04 meters to point 7; N. 57° 03′ E., 12.09 meters to point 8; and S. 30° 08′ 50.75 meters to point of beginning. Containing an area of 11,309 square meters. Bearing True, Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 12 and February 3 and 8, 1933. Orig­inal surveyed February 16, 1925 and December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9095-B, Bsd-4017

A parcel of land Lot No. 9095-B situated in Bonuan Boquig, Dagupan City. Bounded on the NW. along lines 9-10, 10-11, 12-12 and 12-13 by the Lingayen Gulf; on the NE. along lines 13-1 and 1-2 by Lot No. 9094 formerly Lot No. 8901-C, Bsd-3985; on the SE. along line 2-3 by Lot No. 8262 Dagupan Cad.; on the SW. along lines 3-4, 4-5, 5-6, and 7-8 by Lot No. 9095-F of the Sub-division plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being North 43° 00′ E. 382.75 meters from BBM No. 7, Dagupan Cad.,

Thence: S. 30° 45′ E. 72.30 meters to point 2; S. 50° 13′ W., 166.74 meters to point 3; N. 51° 38′ W. 27.27 meters to point 4; S. 50° 49′ W., 108.59 meters to point 5; S. 59° 35′ W., 29.57 meters to point 6; S. 58° 11′ W., 25.04 meters to point 7; S. 59° 42′ W., 37.28 meters to point 8; N. 28° 49′ W., 60.88 meters to point 9; N. 57 ° 03′ E., 82.78 meters to point 10; N. 88° 11′ E., 17655 meters to point 11; N. 42° 47′ E., 6259 meters to point 12; N. 63° 44′ E, 46.48 meters to point 13; and S. 30° 45′ E., 3253 meters to point of beginning. Containing an area of 29,359 square meters. Bearings true. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 12, and February 3 and 8, 19S3. Original survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9095-C, Bsd-4017

A parcel of land situated in the district of Bonuan Gneset, Dagupan City. Bounded on the North, along lines 10-16 by Lingayen Gulf; on the E. along lines 16-17 and 17-1 by Lot No. 9005-A; on the same subdivision; on the SE. along lines 1-6 by Lot No. 567; Dagupan Cad.; on the SW. along line 6-8; by Lot No. 8671, Dag. Cad., and on the W. along line 8-10 by Lot No. 9095-A of the same subdivision. Beginning at a point marked one “1” on plan being S. 74° 11′ W. 246.73 meters more or less, BBM, Dagupan Cadastre.

Thence: S. 50° 09′ W., 242.00 meters to point 2; S. 58° 09′ W., 242.00 meters to point 3; S. 58° 09 W., 202.00 meters to point 4; S. 59° 09′ W., 242.14 meters to point 6; S. 62° 51′ W., 28.89 meters to point 6; N. 18° 26′ W, 60.00 meters to point 7; S. 64° 02′ W., 45.00 meters to point 8; N. 32° 15′ W., 41.64 meters to point 9; N. 51° 34′ E. 62.25 meters to point 10; N. 73° 58′ E., 86.24 meters to point 11; N. 18° 40′ E., 101.98 meters to point 12; N. 63° 29′ E., 662.37 meters to point 13; N. 56° Co’ E., 72.18 meters to point 14; N. 60° 02′ E., 92.23 meters to point 15; N. 58° 06′ E., 49.94 meters to point 16; S. 23° 50′ E., 6.79 meters to point 17; and S. 23° 50′ E., 43.79 meters to the point of beginning. Containing an area of 89,216 square meters. Bearing true. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 12 and February 3, and 8, 1933. Original survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9095-D, Bsd-4017

A parcel of land Lot No. 9095-D, situated in the district of Bonuan Gueset, Dagupan City. Bounded on the North and NE. along lines 15-25 by Lingayen Gulf; on the NE by Lot No. 9095-H of the sub-division plan which is also a barrio road; bounded on the SE along line 2-3 by Lot No. 8039; along line 3-4 by Lot No. 7932; along line 4-5 by Lot No. 7931; along line 5-6 by Lot No. 7930; along line 6-7 by Lot No. 7928; along line 7-8 by Lot No. 7927; along 8-9 by Lot No. 7926; along line 9-10 by Lot No. 7925; along lines 10-12 by Lot No. 2924; along line 12-13 by Lot No. 7886; along lines 14-15 by Lot No. 7883 and Lot No. 7884. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being North 28° 86′ W. 682.10 meters more or less from BLLM No. 7, Dagupan Cad.

Thence: S. 26° 37′ E., 57.47 meters to point 2; S. 63° 18′ W., 199.31 meters to point 3; S. 56° 22′ W., 35.40 meters to point 4; S. 58° 81′ W., 39.07 meters to point 5; S. 61° 05′ W., 24.85 meters to point 6; S. 62° 43′ W., 2051 meters to point 7; S. 60° 46′ W., 81.44 meters to point 8; S. 54° 16′ W., 11.11 meters to point 9; S. 35° 36′ W., 77.56 meters to point 10; S. 44° 81′ W., 65.23 meters to point 11; S. 49° 03′ W., 2.00 meters to point 12; S. 43° 37′ W., 114.55 meters to point 13; S. 43° 33′ W., 77.31 meters to point 14; S. 56° 39′ W., 98.74 meters to point 15; N. 52° 05′ W., 57.00 meters to point 16; N. 5° 22′ W., 77.53 meters to point 17; N. 11° 30′ E., 80.44 meters to point 18; N. 16° 26′ E., 100.40 meters to point 19; N. 36° 09′ E., 147.63 meters to point 20; N. 71° 05′ E., 38.67 meters to point 21; N. 81° 38′ E., 131.05 meters to point 22; N. 80° 25′ E., 100.84 meters to point 23; N. 68° 27′ E., 108.07 meters to point 24; N. 52° 53′ E., 149.69 meters to point 25; and S. 26° 37′ E., 70.51 meters to the point of beginning. Containing an area of 134,029 square meters. Bearing true. Declination 0° 40′ E. Survey January 12, and February 3 and 8, 1933. Original Survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9092-A, Bsd-4019

A parcel of land Lot No. 9092-A, Bsd-4019, situated in the district of Bonuan Boquig, Dagupan City, bounded on the NW along line 5-6; and 6-7 by the Lingayen Gulf; on the NE along line 7-8 and 8-1 by Lot No. 9092-B of the subdivision plan; on the SE along line 1-2 and 2-3 by Lot No. 8810; Dagupan Cad; on the SW along lines 3-4 and 4-5 by Lot No. 9092-E of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked one “1” on plan being No. 67° 38′ W. 487.17 meters from MBM No. 2, Dagupan Cadastre.

Thence: S. 50° 00° W., 130.00 meters to point 2; S. 50° 00′ W., 228.18 meters to point 3; N. 23° 02′ W., 76.29 meters to point 4; N. 23° 02′ W., 36.71 meters to point 5; N. 53° 49′ E., 103.95 meters to point 6; N. 51° 25′ E., 243.47 meters to point 7; N. 27° 02′ E., 37.94 meters to point 8; and S. 27° 02′ E., 59.70 meters to point of beginning. Containing an area of 35,481 square meters. Bearings true. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 5 and 20 and March 3, 1933. Original surveyed February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1925.

Lot No. 9092-B, Bad-4019

A parcel of land Lot No. 9092-B, situated in the district of Bonuan Binloc, Dagupan City. Bounded on the NW along lines 6-7 and 8-9 by Lingayen Gulf; on the NE by Lot No. 9092-C of the subdivision plan which is a road; on the SE. along lines 1-2; 2-3; and 3-4 by Lot No. 8346 Dagupan Cad.; and on the SW along lines 4-5 and 5-6 by Lot No. 9092-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked one “1” being N. 0° 28′ W., 559.64 meters from the MPM No. 2, Deg. Cad.

Thence: S. 50° 00′ W., 200.03 meters to point 2; S. 50° 00′ W., 200.11 meters to point 3; S. 50° 00′ W., 182.00 meters to point 4; N. 27° 02′ W., 59.70 meters to point 5; N. 27° 02′ W., 39.94 meters to point 6: N. 51° 25′ E., 9.61 meters to point 7; N. 60° 58′ E, 831.84 meters to point 8; N. 48° 44′ E., 240.12 meters to point 9; N. 27° 28′ E., 45.85 meters to point 10; and S. 27° 28′ E., 41.70 meters to point of beginning. Containing an area of 53,857 square meters. Bearings True. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 5 and 20 and March 8, 1933. Original survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9092-C, Bsd -4019

A parcel of land Lot No. 9092-C situated in the district of Bonuan Binloc, Dagupan City. Bounded on the NW along lines 9-10 and 10-11; by Lot No. 9092-H of the subdivision plan which is also a barrio road; on the SE along lines 11-12; 12-13 and 13-1 by Lot No. 8813, Dag. Cad., and along line 1-2; 2-3; and 3-4 by Lot No. 834G, Dagupan Cadastre; and on the SW along line 4-5 and 5-6 by Lot No. 9092-B of the subdivision plan, beginning at a point marked one “1” on plan being S. 81° 20° W. 660.80 meters from BLLM No. 11 Dag. Cad.,

Thence: S. 50° 00′ W., 195.00 meters to point 2; S. 50° 00′ W., 195.00 meters to point 3; S. 50° 00′ W., 180.00 meters to point 4; N. 27′ 37′ W., 52.20 meters to point 5; N. 27° 37′ W.. 45.45 meters to point 6; N. 40° 44′ E., 594.04 meters to point 7; N. 47° 26′ E., 301.69 meters to point 8; N. 43° 35′ E. 68.16 meters to point 9; S. 57° 07′ E. 41.98 meters to point 10; S. 57° 07′ E., 38.18 meters to point 11; S. 41° 29′ W. 165.00 meters to point 12; S. 41° 29′ W., 150.00 meters to point 13; and S. 46° 53′ W., 117.12 to the point of beginning, containing an area of 97,292 square meters. Bearing True. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 5 and 20 adn March 3, 1933. Original Survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9094-D, Bsd-4019

A parcel of land Lot No. 9092-D situated in Bonuan Binloc, Dagupan City, bounded on the NW along line 7-8; 8-9; 9-10; 10-11; and 11-12 by Lingayen Gulf; on the NE along lines 12-13 and 13-1 by Lot No. 9092-1, a barrio road; on the SE along lines 1-2; 2-2; 3-4 by Lot No. 9093 Dagupan Cad., along line 4-6 by Lot No. 8813 Dag. Cad., on the SW along lines 5-6 and 6-7 by Lot No. 9092-H, a barrio road. Beginning at a point marked one “1” on plan being S. 32 ° 84′ W. 998.55 meters from MBM No. 1, Dagupan Cadastre;

Thence: S. 41° 29′ W., 245.00 meters to point 2; S. 41° 29′ W., 245.00 meters to point 3; S. 41° 29° W., 240.00 meters to point 4; S. 41° 29′ W., 229.00 meters to point 5; S. 57° 18′ W., 37.55 meters to point 6; N. 57° 18′ W., 42.30 meters to point 7; N. 43° 35′ E., 412.59 meters to point 8; N. 40° 27′ E., 282.64 meters to point 9; N. 47° 54′ E., 4539 meters to point 10; N. 38° 41′ E., 180.78 meters to point 11; N. 39° 28′ E., 57.64 meters to point 12; S. 43 ° 16′ E., 56.16 meters to point 13; and S. 43 ° 16′ E., 19.02 meters to point of beginning. Containing an area of 67,118 square meters. Bearings True. Declination 0° 40° E. Surveyed January 5 and 20 and March 3, 1983. Original surveyed February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 9092-E, Bsd-4019

A parcel of land Lot No. 9092-E situated in the district of Bonuan Binloc, Dagupan City, bounded on the NW. along lines S-4; 4-5; 5-6; 6-7; 7-8; and 8-9 by Lingayen Gulf; on the N by Lingayen Gulf; on the NE along lines 10-11; 11-12; 12-13; and 13-14 by Mangueragday River; on the SE along lines 14-15; 15-16; 16-17 and 17-1 by Lot No. 8480 Dagupan Cadastre and on the SW along lines 1-2; 2-3; by Lot No. 9092-1 of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked one “1” on plan being S. 32° 30′ W. 992.50 meters from MBM No. 1, Dag. Cad.;

Thence: N. 42° 35′ W., 18.55 meters to point 2; N. 43° 35′ W., 56.75 meters to point 3; N. 39° 28′ E., 125.46 meters to point 4; N. 32° 14′ E., 154.88 meters to point 5; N. 36° 36′ E., 116.58 meters to point 6; N. 37° 18′ E., 140.16 meters to point 7; N. 32° 06′ E., 137.29 meters to point 8; N. 12° 27′ E., 313.71 meters to point 9; N. 51° 45′ E., 160.77 meters to point 10; S. 7° 51′ E., 61.67 meters to point 11; S. 12° 54′ W., 80.88 meters to point 12; S. 9° 44′ W., 56.46 meters to point 13; S. 36° 01° E., 329.84 meters to point 14; S. 79° 53′ W., 189.93 meters to point 15; S. 58° 16′ W., 279.43 meters to point 16; S. 41° 29′ W., 157.60 meters to point 17; and S. 41° 29′ W., 300.00 meters to point of beginning, containing an area of 180,360 square meters. Bearings true. Declination 0° 40′ E. Surveyed January 5 and 20 and March 3, 1933. Original survey February 16, 1925 to December 24, 1926.

Lot No. 8862 Owner — Republic of the Philippines

A parcel of land Lot No. 8862, situated in the district of Bonuan Gueset, Dagupan City. Bounded NE by Lot No. 6863 and Lingayen Gulf; on the SE by lots Nos. 6856, 6865, 6854 and 6849; on the SW by Lots No. 6847, 6846 and 6845; on the NW by Lingayen Gulf. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being South 88° 57′ W. 98.68 meters from B.L.L.M. No. 6, Dagupan Cadastre;

Thence: S. 88° 57′ W., 98.68 meters to point 2; S. 22° 41′ W., 36.41 meters to point 3; S. 37° 49′ W., 53.13 meters to point 4; S. 22° 45′ W., 71.06 meters to point 5; S. 71° 26° W., 26.14 meters to point 6; S. 46° 02′ W., 31.96 meters to point 7; S. 56° 09’W., 83.42 meters to point 8; N. 4° 29′ W., 98.85 meters to point 9; N. 28° 58′ E., 58.94 meters to point 10; N. 53° 39′ E., 92.16 meters to point 11; N. 42° 44′ E., 93.89 meters to point 12, and S. 48° 38′ E., 53.26 meters to the point of beginning. Containing an area of 23,761 square meters.

NOTE: The herein technical description were submitted by the City Engineer of Dagupan City. The same is subject to future survey.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 26th day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-three.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President: SALVADOR L. MARIÑO Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
